_comment: V4.2 phase 3 — external ALTO corpus, NEVER used during development. Fetched at CI time by fetch.py from Gallica (source: gallica.bnf.fr / Bibliothèque nationale de France). The dev corpus lives in examples/ (ark bpt6k3265015q) and must never appear here. Integrity: each document MAY pin per-page SHA-256 digests under 'sha256' (page number → hex); fetch.py prints ready-to-paste digests for unpinned pages and fails loudly on drift (Gallica re-OCR). 'max_missing' is the explicit network-flakiness tolerance.

documents.label: Périodes de l'histoire de la médecine, Ch. Daremberg, 1850 (monographie, mode texte)
